title: Golden Yeasty Malaysian Chicken Toast
description: A light and refreshing Malaysian dish featuring yeasty flavors, wholegrain mustard, and toasted bread, perfect for a post-workout snack. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with sensitivities.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
In a bowl, whisk together yeast extract, wholegrain mustard, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced chicken to the bowl and mix well to coat.
Heat the olive oil in the preheated pan and cook the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Toast the whole wheat bread until lightly browned.
Spread a layer of the yeast and mustard mixture on each toasted bread slice.
Top each bread slice with a cooked chicken slice.
Brush the beaten egg over the top of each chicken slice.
